page_metadata.biotools__summary: Computational method for resolution enhancement of Hi-C data. It uses a very deep convolutional neural network to learn the mapping between low-resolution and high-resolution Hi-C contact matrices.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Computational method for resolution enhancement of Hi-C data. It uses a very deep convolutional neural network to learn the mapping between low-resolution and high-resolution Hi-C contact matrices.
